sourceScope.primarySourceFile: NY Regulations/2021 VLM Report_DRAFT-(1-27-2020) with academy Updates V1-Reg-056-11-NYCRR-S094.pdf
sourceScope.sourceTitle: Valuation of Individual and Group Accident and Health Insurance Reserves
sourceScope.sourceStatusNote: Current through March 15, 2020; section 94.12 is repealed and should remain boundary context only; the page-image wording backstop remains required because the text layer is noisy / OCR-like.

observedSectionWindows.note: Title page, purposes, applicability, reserve guidance, tables / incorporated material, and severability with a repealed subsection closeout.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single Regulation 56 PDF.
Do not widen into AG files, practice notes, or other NY regulation files in the same wave.
Keep the purpose / applicability / reserve-guidance / repealed-closeout language review-only until a human confirms the indexing decision.
Keep the page-image wording backstop visible because the text layer is noisy / OCR-like.
Keep the batch source-bound and review-only.
exclusions: No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other guideline files in the same wave.

topicMap.label: Purpose, applicability, reserve guidance, tables / incorporated material, and severability with a repealed subsection closeout
topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep this slice within pages 1-27 and do not absorb other NY regulation files.

proposedBatches.title: Regulation 56 purpose, applicability, reserve guidance, tables / incorporated material, and repealed closeout

pageTarget.notes: Capture the full 27-page regulation as a single review-only slice and stop at the page 27 boundary.

proposedBatches.rationale: Capture the full 27-page regulation as a single review-only slice and stop at the page 27 boundary.

reviewStandards.regulatoryRequirement: Treat the purpose, applicability, reserve-guidance, and severability language as regulatory text when it directs what the company must do.
reviewStandards.definitionOrTerminology: Treat the reserve-method labels, incorporated-material references, and grading language as terminology when the text explains rather than directs.
reviewStandards.crossReferenceMapping: Treat references to Insurance Law and incorporated table material as cross-reference context unless operationalized.
reviewStandards.backgroundContent: Treat the title page and section labels as background unless they impose a requirement.
reviewStandards.boundaryControlWindow: Treat the 27-page slice as a review-only window that should not be merged forward.
reviewStandards.requiresHumanInterpretation: Treat the indexing choice and the noisy OCR-like text layer as requiring human actuarial interpretation unless the text is explicit.
reviewStandards.sourceQualityCaveat: Treat text-layer noise or encoding issues as review-only caveats and do not widen the batch because of them.

appReady: export is sanitized, stable, and versioned

notes: Controlled Regulation 56 planning artifact. Planned batch 273 remains review-only by default and is not an extraction run.
